message:
fix(sqlite): log warning on malformed blocked_by JSON instead of silent fallback

serde_json::from_str(&json).unwrap_or_default() silently converted
corrupt blocked_by JSON to an empty vec, making blocked issues appear
unblocked. Now logs a warning with the issue ID and parse error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
